Consent Gate UX.question: How should the consent gate work in practice — when does it fire?
What does the per-meeting consent dialog look like — what must the user do?
options_presented: Just a modal with OK button

Consent Gate UX.question: Should the consent gate handle jurisdiction complexity?
Consent Gate UX.answer: No — always require all-party consent, no exceptions
options_presented: Yes — allow user to select jurisdiction

Consent Gate UX.question: Should content protection (hide from screen-share) be on by default or opt-in?
Consent Gate UX.answer: On by default, user can turn off
options_presented: On by default, user can turn off
Off by default, user can turn on

Retention Policy Defaults.question: Raw audio: after the transcript is generated, what happens to the audio file?
Retention Policy Defaults.answer: Deleted by default, user can opt-in to keep audio
options_presented: Deleted by default, user can opt-in to keep audio

Retention Policy Defaults.question: Transcripts and meeting artifacts — what is the default retention period?
What happens to all data when the user uninstalls the app?
Retention Policy Defaults.answer: Data persists unless user explicitly exports/deletes first
options_presented: Data persists unless user explicitly deletes first
App provides 'wipe all data' button; uninstall leaves DB on disk
